summary: Actuary Marketplace page redesign tested. Fixed bug where actuary users saw directory view instead of quotes list. All core features working: directory with search/sort, quote cards with status badges, certification review page with progress stepper, chat, documents, and action buttons.
passed_tests: Backend: Employer login (fajju2001@gmail.com / test123) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/actuary-marketplace - Returns 6 actuaries with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/quotes (employer) - Returns 1 validated quote
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/quotes/{id} - Returns full quote detail with full_plan, document_checklist, documents
Backend: Actuary login (emily.park@parkreed.com / test123) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/quotes (actuary) - Returns quotes assigned to actuary
Backend: GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications with unread count
Frontend: Actuary Marketplace page loads with data-testid='actuary-marketplace-page'
Frontend: Directory tab shows 6 actuary cards with search and sort
Frontend: My Requests tab shows quote cards with status badges
Frontend: Clicking quote card opens certification review page inline
Frontend: Certification review page shows progress stepper (Requested→Accepted→Paid→Delivered→Validated)
Frontend: Plan details section with premiums table and cost sharing
Frontend: Chat section renders messages and allows sending
Frontend: Employer Documents and Actuary Deliverables sections render
Frontend: Back to Marketplace button works correctly
Frontend: Request Quote dialog opens with plan selector and submit button
Frontend: Actuary view shows 'Certification Requests' title (not 'Actuary Marketplace')
Frontend: Actuary view hides Directory tab correctly
Frontend: Actuary view shows 'All Requests' tab instead of 'My Requests'
Frontend: Robert Chen (actuary) sees his assigned validated quote

bugs_fixed.issue: Actuary users saw directory view instead of quotes list because default tab was 'directory'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed default tab to 'quotes' for actuary users: useState(user?.role === 'actuary' ? 'quotes' : 'directory')

critical_code_review_comments: ActuaryMarketplacePage.js correctly implements new design with Deep Forest Green (#1C3B35) color palette
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Progress stepper correctly shows workflow status
Chat section with real-time message loading (8 second polling)
Status badges render correctly for all statuses (Validated, Pending, Accepted, Paid, Delivered, Revision Requested)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing validated quote for Bronze HDHP plan.

mocked_apis_list: LLM key budget exhausted - predictive features use rule-based fallback

context_for_next_testing_agent: Actuary Marketplace page redesign verified. Key points: (1) Fixed bug where actuary users saw directory instead of quotes list. (2) All tabs working: Directory, My Requests, Completed. (3) Certification review page shows progress stepper, plan details, chat, documents. (4) Robert Chen actuary has 1 validated quote (Bronze HDHP, 89% MV). (5) Emily Park actuary has no quotes assigned.

design_verification.fonts: Manrope for headings, Work Sans for body
design_verification.status_badges: All 6 status types render correctly with appropriate colors

directory_tab.actuary_cards: 6 cards with name, firm, price, turnaround, rating, specialties

my_requests_tab.quote_cards: Shows plan name, status badge, actuary/employer name, price, days

certification_review_page.plan_details: Carrier, Plan Type, MV%, MEC Qualified, Premiums table, Cost sharing
certification_review_page.document_sections: Employer Documents and Actuary Deliverables with upload/download

actuary_view.title: Certification Requests (not Actuary Marketplace)
actuary_view.quote_display: Shows Employer name instead of Actuary name
